title: Scope D T-D3: CLI plan-context-hint shim — surface auto_healed + previous_revision_hash
description: Extend PlanContextHintOutput type with optional auto_healed + previous_revision_hash fields and populate from PlanContextResult. Protocol version stays at 2 since the additions are purely optional (additive — non-breaking).

files.change: Add optional fields to PlanContextHintOutput: `auto_healed?: boolean`, `previous_revision_hash?: string`. In payload assembly (lines 167-174), populate from `result.auto_healed` and `result.previous_revision_hash` (only when present — omit when undefined to keep payload lean). Version remains 2.

Tests: (1) fresh meta → payload has NO auto_healed field; (2) auto-healed meta (mock planContext returning auto_healed:true) → payload carries auto_healed:true + previous_revision_hash; (3) version remains 2 in both cases; (4) downstream wire-format remains JSON-parseable (no breaking schema).

implementation: Update payload assembly conditionals (only emit when defined)
Run `pnpm --filter @fabric/cli test plan-context-hint` to confirm green

reference.examples: Existing conditional fields (broad_count etc.) show the optional-field pattern

criteria: PlanContextHintOutput.auto_healed and previous_revision_hash are optional fields, populated only when auto-heal occurred
Payload remains JSON-parseable by existing hook (knowledge-hint-broad.cjs)
4 new tests pass; existing plan-context-hint.test.ts green

rationale.chosen_approach: Additive optional fields keep protocol v2 valid
alternatives_considered: Bump to v3 (over-engineered for additive change)
decision_factors: Hook can opt-in to render via existing version-2 path

manual_checks: Pipe a synthesized auto-healed plan-context payload to knowledge-hint-broad.cjs locally, inspect output
